name: SAPNRG-PA
summary: SAPNRG-PA is likely a preference share of Sapura Energy Berhad, a Malaysian integrated oil and gas services company listed on the Kuala Lumpur Stock Exchange (KLSE). Sapura Energy provides engineering, procurement, construction, installation, and operation services to the oil and gas industry. Preference shares typically offer a fixed dividend and have priority over ordinary shares in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution during liquidation.
